final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input [31:0] key,
    input [31:0] nonce,
    output reg [31:0] stream_output
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    stream_output <= key ^ nonce; // Simple mixing function
end

endmodule
